testsuite.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro
testcase.classname: Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 2 passageiros
testcase.classname: Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 2 passageiros

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro e 1 criança sem assento
testcase.classname: Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro e 1 criança sem assento

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 20000ms: expected '<button#buy-ticket-35359-0.focusable>' to be 'visible'
This element `<button#buy-ticket-35359-0.focusable>` is not visible because its parent `<div.available.col-12.col-xl-6.ml-xl-auto.mt-3.mt-sm-4.mt-xl-0>` has CSS property: `display: none`

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 20000ms: expected '<button#buy-ticket-35359-0.focusable>' to be 'visible'
This element `<button#buy-ticket-35359-0.focusable>` is not visible because its parent `<div.available.col-12.col-xl-6.ml-xl-auto.mt-3.mt-sm-4.mt-xl-0>` has CSS property: `display: none` at Context.eval (webpack://cypress-treino/./cypress/support/commands.js:307:9) at getRet (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122798:20) at tryCatcher (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:1777:23) at Promise.attempt.Promise.try (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:4285:29) at Context.thenFn (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122809:66) at Context.then (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:123060:21) at wrapped (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:146287:19)

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA e Volta com 1 passageiro
